item.title: In 24 hours I will be 1 day clean.
item.description: I'm not going to beat myself up over this. I'm going to Keep Calm and Carry on. Wish me luck. Edit: So I guess this kind of blew up. I just wanted a word of encouragement but you guys are overwhelming. Ty so much for the support. Vote Harris.

item.dc:creator: jayman0123

item.title: Whoops
item.description: Some hometown folks were bitching that a local republican was running for state congress unopposed. They were asking "Who's a better person to write in? Betty Boop? Superman?" So jokingly, I said "Fuck it. Write me in. At least I exist." Now I have something like 20 people stating they're going to write me in, and I keep getting tagged in shit. My campaign slogan is apparently "Fuck it. I'm voting for {TheSecondPiewackit}." All joking aside, you (yes, YOU, citizen) are literally more qualified than every single republican running for every single office. If MTG, Bobo, and Forehead Gaetz can spend every single day tripping over their own dicks and still be "Winning", you can do it too. This is your Incrementalism. This is how we fight back. Run for something. Anything. Those fuckers will put high school drop-out creationists on school boards. YOU are better. Half of these jobs literally only require to vote for things. You already know how to do that.
item.dc:creator: TheSecondPiewackit

item.dc:creator: EpisodeZero

item.title: Returning stolen goods pt 80
item.description:
The ship. Cause Titanic. My grandma, born 1911, always had this obsession with Titanic and it obviously transferred on to me.
You did.
My mom and I have a really great relationship. I could always talk to her about anything and everything. She always said "we all feel like that sometimes, sweetie". Ya. So. Im 40, she's 80, and I got the ADHD diagnosis just 3 months ago. .... It's apparently hereditary so all those times my mom reassured me that "everyone thinks like that".. well, yes well all us neurodivergents think like that, mom. She means well ❤️ Im just learning sooo much about mental health lately. Mom was like "ooohhhhhh..... are those adhd traits???" And I said "yes, wanna go get tested?" She laughed and said "Naaaaah Im 80 and I love who I am, why bother". Love her ❤️❤️❤️
It's me. Im the friend. Well, I was when I was young. Decorated the stupid traffic cone with pink wrapping paper and a sparkly red wig and it was *chef's kiss
item.dc:creator: MrsPrendsen

item.title: I have too many memes, help! A Phone Dump Part 1.
item.description:
I don’t actually spend my money on horses. Not anymore. I know someone who does though (they are a professional horse trainer and dressage rider so I probably sent this to them)
Just dumping these here because I have far too many…over 9,000. Anyways they’re in no particular order but trying to start from oldest to newest.

item.title: Images of Note: cow balls are basically bees
item.description:
Can't wait to see this turn up in a Mentor Pilot video
same
BASICALLY
if it's REALLY bad we'll get some very good poetry out of it.
This is basically how I think I look like when eating a burger or lunch.
need to remember this
meow
oh no
real
a.
this is what I think meeting an angel would be like. not comforting and glorious, but unnerving and terrifying.
never change Scotland
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging

Tell me if you like em, I will post more soon.

item.title: Working on knee raises with ankle weights.
item.description: Working hard on the building strength. My cerebral palsy affects my right side more. It's challenging to lift my right leg as high but it is getting better. I'm also trying not to lean forward too much.

We invented math so that we could collect math rocks.
Don't make it weird internet.
?
Well now it's weird.
Isabel is perfection
Recommended play style.
Amen, trans rights.
Cat tax (not mine)
I hope I was able to give you some Endorphins, thanks for your time, folks!
